mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO role_control_unit_relation (
id,
create_time, update_time,
role_id, control_unit_id, application_authorization_id, status,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES (
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{controlUnitId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{applicationAuthorizationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )

INSERT INTO role_control_unit_relation (
id,
create_time, update_time,
role_id, control_unit_id, application_authorization_id, status,
delete_flag,
version ) VALUES
(
#{item.id, jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{item.roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.controlUnitId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.applicationAuthorizationId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
0,
0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE role_control_unit_relation
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
role_id = #{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
control_unit_id = #{controlUnitId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
application_authorization_id = #{applicationAuthorizationId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT rcur.control_unit_id FROM role_control_unit_relation rcur JOIN control_unit cu ON rcur.control_unit_id = cu.id WHERE rcur.delete_flag = 0 AND cu.delete_flag = 0 AND rcur.role_id = #{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND rcur.application_authorization_id = #{authorizationId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND rcur.status = 'DEACTIVATED' and cu.landing = 0 AND cu.control_unit_scope != 'PERPETUAL'

select rcur.control_unit_id, count(all_rcur.id) as activated_count from role_control_unit_relation rcur join control_unit cu on cu.id = rcur.control_unit_id join role_control_unit_relation all_rcur on all_rcur.control_unit_id = rcur.control_unit_id and all_rcur.role_id = #{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT} and all_rcur.status = 'ACTIVATED' and all_rcur.delete_flag = 0 where rcur.role_id = #{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT} and rcur.application_authorization_id = #{authorizationId, jdbcType=BIGINT} and rcur.status = 'ACTIVATED' and rcur.delete_flag = 0 and cu.control_unit_scope != 'PERPETUAL' and cu.delete_flag = 0 and cu.landing = 0 group by rcur.control_unit_id
mapper.update:
UPDATE role_control_unit_relation r JOIN role ro ON r.role_id = ro.id SET r.status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, r.version = r.version + 1, r.update_time = NOW() WHERE r.delete_flag = 0 AND ro.delete_flag = 0 AND ro.organ_id = #{organId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND (r.application_authorization_id = #{authorizationId, jdbcType=BIGINT} OR r.application_authorization_id IS NULL) AND r.control_unit_id IN
#{id}

UPDATE role_control_unit_relation
update_time = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
role_id = #{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
control_unit_id = #{controlUnitId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
application_authorization_id = #{applicationAuthorizationId, jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND version = #{version, jdbcType=INTEGER}

UPDATE role_control_unit_relation
delete_flag = 1, version = version + 1
WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)

UPDATE role_control_unit_relation
delete_flag = 1, version = version + 1
WHERE role_id = #{roleId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)
mapper.select:
SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
role_id, control_unit_id, application_authorization_id, status,
delete_flag,
version FROM role_control_unit_relation WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
AND (delete_flag = 0 OR delete_flag IS NULL)

SELECT
id,
create_time, update_time,
role_id, control_unit_id, application_authorization_id, status,
delete_flag,
version FROM role_control_unit_relation

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT rcur.control_unit_id) AS total_control_unit_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN rcur.status = 'ACTIVATED' THEN rcur.control_unit_id END) AS active_control_unit_count FROM user_role_relation urr JOIN role_control_unit_relation rcur ON rcur.role_id = urr.role_id AND rcur.delete_flag = 0 WHERE urr.delete_flag = 0 AND urr.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
